global_invariants: Detection emits an audit event; block_action MUST be respected.
Safety rules are subordinate to layer-32 conflict policy.
Block actions never silently rewrite an artefact; they require human action.

risks.block_action: BLOCK placement; require supersedes-relation or rejection.
risks.detection: sha256 collision OR same logical artefact across paths
artefact placed outside any defined product-level/portfolio-level/shared-ecosystem folder

risks.block_action: BLOCK placement; split or re-route via intake-consultation.
risks.detection: artefact placed under wrong product OR mixing multiple products' content under one product folder

risks.block_action: BLOCK placement; default to lowest plausible and escalate.
risks.detection: trust tier not assignable from provenance
portfolio-level artefact placed under a single product folder

risks.block_action: BLOCK promotion; require lineage repair before reviewer-validation.
risks.detection: ingestion-lineage event missing OR upstream artefact unreachable

risks.block_action: BLOCK placement; split into per-purpose artefacts.
risks.detection: single artefact carries content belonging to two or more scopes/classes

risks.block_action: BLOCK promotion; mark lifecycle state correctly.
risks.detection: OCR-extracted content ingested without 'ocr-derived' lifecycle state
